# Gates 1–2 Evidence

## E2-1 — contract extraction (REQ-020)

Observed files: `docs/SPEC.md`, `docs/INTENT.md`, execution plan, traceability
matrix, state, assumptions, risks, defects, and plan-change ledger. Twenty
stable requirements cover identity, packet, decision, durability, adapters,
workers, formats, CLI, release, and handoff.

## E2-2 — architecture decisions

ADRs 0001–0007 bind clean-break identity, state and packet safety, consensus,
adapter boundaries, edit safety, network workers, and document extraction.
